metadata.description: Personal Claude Code plugins by cjunekim.

plugins.name: nemotron-personas-korea
plugins.description: Korean LLM-as-respondent toolkit built around the nvidia/Nemotron-Personas-Korea HuggingFace dataset (1M synthetic Korean adults). Bundles a dataset-reference skill (schema quirks, instrument-design lessons, bundled inspection + persona-loader scripts), a persona-respondent sub-agent for closed-form survey calls, and a /persona-interviewee slash command for in-character qualitative interviews.
